R0244.title: Unauthorized RAG Retrieval
R0244.definition: Retrieval-augmented systems return document fragments or sensitive knowledge that the user is not authorized to access.

references.title: OWASP Top 10 for Large Language Model Applications

R0244.description: Retrieval-augmented systems return document fragments or sensitive knowledge that the user is not authorized to access.
R0244.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
